'''Por Forian''' was a company known for its production of various [[Power cell/Legends|power cells]]. One of their products was the [[H-Stable Power Cell]] which were used aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']].<ref name="Riders" />

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}}
